100 Years Ago Today, This is What Was Happening ...

On February 22, 1926, the League of Nations made headlines as it sought to address the ongoing tensions in Europe, particularly regarding disarmament discussions. In the United States, the Supreme Court ruled on a landmark case involving the rights of labor unions, marking a significant moment in labor relations. Meanwhile, in the world of sports, the Winter Olympics in Chamonix, France, continued to capture international attention, showcasing thrilling athletic feats.
